metadata.name: pigeon_hook
metadata.description: Transfer Hook for PigeonHouse - fee accrual + permissionless sweep

accounts.name: bonding_curve
docs: SAFETY: owner validated against hook_config.pigeon_house_program, complete flag at offset 112.

instructions.name: claim_vault
docs: Emergency recovery — authority claims stuck tokens. NOT in mainnet burn flow.

accounts.name: vault_token_ata
docs: Vault's token ATA (source — holds swept tokens)

accounts.name: destination_ata
docs: Destination ATA (authority's wallet or designated address)

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint this vault will track

accounts.name: extra_account_metas
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList PDA for the transfer hook

accounts.name: vault_pigeon_ata
docs: Vault's PIGEON ATA (for receiving PIGEON during sweep)

instructions.name: sweep_and_burn
docs: Legacy sweep — withdraw-only, no swap/burn. Kept for emergency recovery.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint whose fees are being swept

accounts.name: vault_token_ata
docs: Vault's token ATA (receives withheld TransferFee tokens)

instructions.name: sweep_fee_accrual
docs: Mainnet burn path — on-chain Jupiter swap + burn_checked in single instruction.
Permissionless. Single-mint. No authority wallet in the path.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: The launched token mint whose fees are being swept

accounts.name: vault_source_ata
docs: Program-owned ATA: holds withdrawn launched tokens (source for swap)

accounts.name: vault_pigeon_ata
docs: Program-owned ATA: receives PIGEON from Jupiter, then burned

accounts.name: fee_accrual_vault
docs: FeeAccrualVault PDA (extra account #1) — writable for counter updates

errors.name: FeeAlreadyActivated
errors.msg: TransferFee already activated for this token

errors.name: VaultEmpty
errors.msg: Vault is empty, nothing to sweep

errors.name: SwapFailed
errors.msg: DEX swap failed or returned zero

fields.name: address
docs: The address whose exempt status changed

fields.name: exempt
docs: true = added to exempt list, false = removed

fields.name: total_burned
docs: Lifetime PIGEON burned for this mint

types.name: FeeActivated
docs: Emitted when TransferFee is activated post-graduation

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that can update config (Squads/multisig compatible)

fields.name: min_transfer
docs: Minimum transfer amount to trigger hook logic

fields.name: pigeon_house_program
docs: PigeonHouse program ID (for BondingCurve owner validation)

fields.name: total_burned_all
docs: Global lifetime PIGEON burned counter (all mints)

fields.name: min_sweep_threshold
docs: Minimum accrued balance before sweep is allowed

types.name: HookFeeAccrued
docs: Emitted by execute_hook on every qualifying transfer (locked schema)

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint whose transfer triggered this

fields.name: total_accrued
docs: Lifetime total accrued for this mint

types.name: HookSwapSkipped
docs: Emitted when hook skips swap (mode=LogOnly, below threshold, etc.)

types.name: ReserveVault
docs: Reserve vault — holds PIGEON from sweep split

fields.name: overflow_action
docs: What to do when cap exceeded

types.name: SweepExecuted
docs: Emitted by sweep_fee_accrual on successful on-chain swap + burn (locked schema)

fields.name: pigeon_burned
docs: PIGEON burned (== pigeon_received, burned in same ix)

fields.name: total_burned
docs: Lifetime PIGEON burned for this mint
